[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000111001 4
1 100110100 4
2 000000000 a
3 001111100 5
4 110100101 5
5 101000100 3
6 111101100 6
7 110000011 4

23 000000000 a match 2
